# Migration files whose deletion is intentional and reviewed — listed here to pass the
# deleted-migration guard in repo-checks (hogli lint:migration-deletions). Deleting a migration
# that exists on master diverges fresh DBs from deployed ones; see
# docs/published/handbook/engineering/safe-django-migrations.md.
#
# Add a path ONLY when the deletion is genuinely safe and reviewed (a product move, a
# revert of a not-yet-deployed migration, a squash). One entry per line; a directory entry
# allowlists everything under it (trailing slash optional). Remove stale entries once merged.
#
# Examples (commented out, not active):
#   products/old_product/backend/migrations/   # whole-product move
#   posthog/migrations/0500_oops.py            # single revert
